summary: P0 Production Migration Sprint - ALL TESTS PASSED. Backend: 18/18 pytest tests pass covering health, login, upload (Cloudinary fallback), feed, CORS cleanup, modal CSS, socket dedup, and migration placeholder features. Frontend: UI verified via Playwright - login works, feed loads, notification bell with badge (13 unread), socket connected successfully, mobile responsive nav works, no scroll-lock bug.

backend_api_tests.test_upload_image: PASS - POST /api/upload with image returns file_id, path, url
backend_api_tests.test_cors_origins_no_localhost: PASS - server.py cors_origins does not contain localhost

cloudinary_tests.test_cloudinary_utility_exists: PASS - cloudinary_upload.py has is_cloudinary_configured() and upload_image_buffer()
cloudinary_tests.test_cloudinary_fallback_logic: PASS - collection.py upload route checks Cloudinary, falls back to Emergent storage

modal_tests.test_dialog_component_mobile_classes: PASS - dialog.jsx has max-h-[85vh], overflow-y-auto, modal-mobile-scale, onCloseAutoFocus
modal_tests.test_sheet_component_scroll_fix: PASS - sheet.jsx has onCloseAutoFocus scroll lock fix
modal_tests.test_alert_dialog_mobile_classes: PASS - alert-dialog.jsx has onCloseAutoFocus and modal-mobile-scale

notification_dedup_tests.test_socket_context_dedup: PASS - SocketContext has processedIds Set for deduplication
notification_dedup_tests.test_navbar_notification_dedup: PASS - Navbar has prevCountRef (-1 start) and shownNotifIds for dedup

migration_placeholder_tests.test_image_url_legacy_check: PASS - imageUrl.js has isLegacyUploadUrl function checking /uploads/ path
migration_placeholder_tests.test_album_art_migration_placeholder: PASS - AlbumArt.js shows migration-placeholder for legacy URLs
migration_placeholder_tests.test_postcards_onerror_handler: PASS - PostCards.js img tags have onError handlers with isLegacyUploadUrl check

css_tests.test_modal_mobile_scale_css: PASS - index.css has modal-mobile-scale with max-height 85vh, overflow-y auto
css_tests.test_migration_placeholder_css: PASS - index.css has migration-placeholder and migration-placeholder-text styles

frontend_ui_tests.login_flow: PASS - Admin login successful, navigated to /hive
frontend_ui_tests.feed_content: PASS - 21 card elements, 9 post type badges found
frontend_ui_tests.notification_bell: PASS - Badge shows 13 unread, 16 notification items in dropdown
frontend_ui_tests.socket_connection: PASS - [LiveHive] Connected message found in console
frontend_ui_tests.mobile_responsive: PASS - Mobile bottom nav and top bar visible on 390x844 viewport
frontend_ui_tests.scroll_lock: PASS - No spurious body overflow:hidden without modal

critical_code_review_comments: Cloudinary integration properly falls back to Emergent storage when CLOUDINARY_CLOUD_NAME is not set
Modal components have comprehensive scroll-lock fix via onCloseAutoFocus callback
Socket deduplication implemented at both context level (processedIds Set) and Navbar level (shownNotifIds Set)
prevCountRef starts at -1 to skip initial notification flood on page load
context_for_next_testing_agent: P0 Migration Sprint features verified: 1) Cloudinary upload with fallback works (uploads go to Emergent storage when Cloudinary not configured), 2) Global mobile modal fix with max-height 85vh and overflow-y auto via modal-mobile-scale class, 3) Notification deduplication via processedIds Set in SocketContext and shownNotifIds in Navbar (prevCountRef starts at -1), 4) Migration placeholder for legacy /uploads paths in AlbumArt and PostCards, 5) CORS origins cleaned up - no localhost. All 18 backend tests pass. Frontend UI working correctly.

cloudinary_integration.fallback: Uses Emergent object storage (put_object) when Cloudinary not configured

mobile_modal_fix.scroll_lock_fix: onCloseAutoFocus resets body.style.overflow and removes data-scroll-locked

notification_deduplication.socket_context: processedIds useRef(new Set()) caps at 200 entries
notification_deduplication.navbar: shownNotifIds Set prevents duplicate browser notifications, prevCountRef=-1 skips initial flood

migration_placeholder.album_art: Shows migration-placeholder div with 'migration in progress' text
migration_placeholder.postcards: onError handlers check isLegacyUploadUrl and show placeholder
